justification: All pass criteria met: stripe wildcard identified as Critical, jsonwebtoken CVEs flagged as Critical with specific CVE numbers, 5/5 risks identified (stripe, jsonwebtoken, crypto-random-string, left-pad, moment), safe_to_deploy is false, severity ratings are differentiated (Critical for stripe/jwt/esm, Important for moment/left-pad, Suggestions for tooling). Additionally found bonus issues (pg range, missing lockfile).

observations.text: All 5 expected dependency risks identified with accurate technical detail
Stripe wildcard correctly classified as Critical with concrete reproduction steps
jsonwebtoken flagged with specific CVE numbers (CVE-2022-23529, 23539, 23540, 23541) and attack vectors
crypto-random-string ESM incompatibility correctly identified with the ERR_REQUIRE_ESM mechanism
left-pad supply chain risk noted with historical context
moment.js deprecation identified and placed at Important rather than Critical, showing severity differentiation
Bonus findings: pg wide range and missing package-lock.json add value beyond the rubric
Actionable fixes provided for every finding with time estimates
crypto-random-string rated Critical rather than Important — while defensible given it causes a startup crash, the rubric expected Important severity
moment.js placed in important_issues rather than suggestions — rubric expected Suggestion severity, though the distinction is minor
